docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY COLE SALLOU AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON HARSHAW SHEILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
